argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const PRODUCT_TITLE_SELECTOR = '#productTitle, #title span, [data-feature-name="title"] h1 span'; const BYLINE_SELECTOR = '#bylineInfo, [data-feature-name="bylineInfo"] #bylineInfo'; const PRIMARY_PRICE_SELECTORS = ['#corePrice_feature_div .a-offscreen','#corePriceDisplay_desktop_feature_div .a-offscreen','#corePrice_desktop .a-offscreen','#apex_desktop .a-offscreen','#newAccordionRow_0 .a-offscreen','#price_inside_buybox','#priceblock_ourprice','#priceblock_dealprice','#tp_price_block_total_price_ww']; const normalize = v => (v || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const href = normalize(window.location.href); const asinMatch = href.match(/\/(?:dp|gp\/product)\/([A-Z0-9]{10})/i); const asin = asinMatch ? asinMatch[1].toUpperCase() : ''; const title = normalize(document.querySelector(PRODUCT_TITLE_SELECTOR)?.textContent || ''); const brand = normalize(document.querySelector(BYLINE_SELECTOR)?.textContent || ''); let price_text = ''; for (const sel of PRIMARY_PRICE_SELECTORS) { const text = document.querySelector(sel)?.textContent || ''; if (text.trim()) { price_text = normalize(text); break; } } const priceMatch = price_text.match(/([$\u20ac\u00a3])\s*(\d+(?:,\d{3})*(?:\.\d+)?)/); const price_value = priceMatch ? parseFloat(priceMatch[2].replace(/,/g, '')) : null; const currency = priceMatch ? {'$':'USD','\u20ac':'EUR','\u00a3':'GBP'}[priceMatch[1]] : ''; const rating_text = normalize(document.querySelector('#acrPopover')?.getAttribute('title') || document.querySelector('#acrPopover')?.textContent || ''); const ratingMatch = rating_text.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*out of 5/i); const rating_value = ratingMatch ? parseFloat(ratingMatch[1]) : null; const review_count_text = normalize(document.querySelector('#acrCustomerReviewText')?.textContent || ''); const reviewCountMatch = review_count_text.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*([kKmM])/); let review_count = null; if (reviewCountMatch) { const v = parseFloat(reviewCountMatch[1]); const m = /[mM]/.test(reviewCountMatch[2]) ? 1000000 : 1000; review_count = Math.round(v * m); } else { const m2 = review_count_text.match(/([\d,]+)/); review_count = m2 ? parseInt(m2[1].replace(/,/g, ''), 10) : null; } const review_url = normalize(document.querySelector('a[href*="#customerReviews"]')?.href || ''); const qa_url = normalize(document.querySelector('a[href*="ask/questions"]')?.href || ''); const bullets = [...new Set(Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#feature-bullets li .a-list-item')).map(n => normalize(n.textContent || '')).filter(Boolean))]; const breadcrumbs = [...new Set(Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#wayfinding-breadcrumbs_feature_div a')).map(n => normalize(n.textContent || '')).filter(Boolean))]; const mainImg = document.querySelector('#landingImage')?.src || document.querySelector('#main-image-container img')?.src || ''; return [{ asin, title, brand, price_text, price_value, currency, rating_text, rating_value, review_count_text, review_count, review_url, qa_url, bullets: bullets.join(', '), breadcrumbs: breadcrumbs.join(' > '), main_img: mainImg, url: href }]; }

variables.name: delay
variables.help: 随机浏览时间基数(ms), 实际时间为 delay ~ 2*delay
